title: AI Developer Intern (Artificial Intelligence & Automation)
description:
About Orchid Island Luxury Real Estate
Orchid Island Luxury Real Estate is building one of Morocco's most innovative luxury property platforms, combining high end real estate with next generation technologies: artificial intelligence, automation, and predictive analytics. Based in the heart of Marrakech, we work with premium international investors and clients, and we are expanding our tech team to support our rapid growth.
This AI Developer Internship in Marrakech offers you a hands on, real-world experience working on live AI projects with measurable business impact. Real tech work from day one.

Internship Responsibilities
Working alongside our Technology & Innovation team, you will contribute to three core areas:
AI Agents & Integration
• Design, develop and integrate autonomous AI agents and virtual assistants for client facing applications
• Connect LLM-based AI features (OpenAI API, Claude, LangChain) to our existing web platform
• Test, evaluate and iterate on deployed AI models for performance and accuracy
Data Science & Predictive Analytics
• Process and analyse real estate datasets using Python.
• Build predictive models to identify market trends and property valuation patterns in Morocco
• Design and maintain intelligent performance dashboards for internal teams
Automation & Technology Watch
• Automate internal workflows and processes using scripting and RPA tools
• Conduct regular technology watch on emerging AI frameworks, tools and architectures
• Experiment with generative AI solutions, prompt engineering and agent based systems
Required Skills & Qualifications
Technical Skills:
• Currently studying or recently graduated in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, Software Engineering or related field.
• Strong proficiency in Python and experience integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
• Knowledge of AI & automation ecosystem: LangChain, autonomous agents, advanced prompting
• Familiarity with REST APIs, databases and basic web development is a plus
• Languages: Fluent French required; English is an asset.
Personal Qualities:
• Strong analytical mindset and ability to work independently
• Genuine passion for AI innovation and emerging technologies
• Fast learner with a hands-on, problem solving approach.
Perks & Benefits
• Daily hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI technologies.
• Direct contribution to real projects involving international premium investors and clients
• Rapid skill growth: machine learning, NLP, data engineering and automation
• Strong opportunity for long-term collaboration or permanent role following the internship
• Dynamic, international and stimulating work environment in Marrakech city centre
How to Apply
Send your CV and a short cover letter (motivation) to:
• Email: orchidland55@gmail.com
• Phone / WhatsApp: +212 6 22 22 22 02
• Email subject (mandatory): AI Developer Internship – Marrakech
